iterations.theme: The Art of Christian Decision-Making and Understanding True Love
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast transcript is included in this single iteration as its total duration (26 minutes) is less than the minimum specified length for an iteration (35-45 minutes). The content flows thematically from decision-making to the nature of love.
